title: Paintings+
description: Adds 74 new vanilla style painting variants
body:
Paintings+ is a small mod that adds many, many (74) more original paintings to minecraft, in a mostly vanilla style. Unlike resource packs, paintings+ keeps the original minecraft paintings. Unfortunately, this means that the mod needs to be installed on the client and the server.

All the paintings were created by Funny art man#3233 and the mod was developed by pika#8957 using MCreator.

The majority of paintings are 1x1, but there are some larger ones.

![All of the paintings on a wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KDv6QG0L/images/3316d08c96770385e8edf8c4e8b8e85f4549ccbe.png)
